title: Story Generator
description: Create a Storybook story for a component.

name.description: The name of the component to create a story for.
name.x-prompt: What component would you like to create a story for?

project.x-prompt: Which project would you like to add the story to?

path.description: The path at which to create the story file, relative to the project root.

directory.description: The directory where the component is located (relative to project src).
